title: ROADSTER 10 W Cob 250 L Portable & Rechargeable Floodlight
features: ROADSTER 10w rechargeable Cob LED work light 250 lumen
ROADSTER 10 Watt rechargeable Cob LED work light a powerfull 250 lumen
description: ROADSTER 10w rechargeable Cob LED work light 250 lumen product option: 31066C barcode: 5038673310664 ROADSTER 10 watt rechargeable Cob LED work light a power full 250 lumen. Supplied complete with both a mains USB chargerand a car Charger unit, so can be charged at work were no electricity is available. Led cordless work light has been developed and designed primarily for tradesmen to use on the work site or inside where there may be poor lighting, or no lighting at all. Although designed for the work site, this work light is ideal for a number of uses around the home, garden, camping, workshop, worksite, Loft or garage. One of its biggest benefits of this light is its compact size, it can easily be stored during transit and wont get in the way during use no cables to trip or fall over. Cob LED is very reliable and does not suffer from the downfalls of hallogen bulbs were the slightest knock when hot breaks the element. With the latest Cob "chip on board" Led technology theres no element to break as it works from a fixed light chip. Unlike many traditional site lights the LED does not emit heat, so the glass is cool to the touch so no fire hazzards. The work-light features a sturdy steel stand. The head can be set at any angle via the friction thumb turn knobs so you can have light exactly where you need it. Powered by a heavy-duty lithium-ion battery that is both lightweight, powerful and provides 3 hours of continuous light on one full charge. Water resistant to IP44 standard.
